heading: Availability of material for Naval Militia
label: 8904 Availability of material for Naval Militia
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7854.50 U.S.C. 1074, .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 50466 Stat. 500The words “are or may be made”, before the word “available”, are omitted as surplusage.In clause (1) the word “members” is substituted for the word “personnel”.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7854 of this title2006— substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” and “any State, the District of Columbia, Guam, or the Virgin Islands” for “any State, any Territory, or the District of Columbia” in introductory provisions and substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in par. (1).Pub. L. 109–163

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.text: at least 95 percent of the members of the portion or unit of the Naval Militia to which the facilities would be made available are members of the Navy Reserve or the Marine Corps Reserve; and
the organization, administration, and training of the Naval Militia conform to standards prescribed by the Secretary.
